method: Outside-in crawl (browser UA, robots-respecting — nyc.gov robots.txt only disallows /html/misc/). Fingerprinted nyc.gov/site/nycha (Akamai + nginx + NYC.gov 'Livesite' platform + Dynatrace) and the Self Service Portal at selfserve.nycha.info/nycha/app/eservice/enu (identified as Oracle Siebel CRM via SWECmd + OracleSiebel_logo.gif + page title). Verified the NYC Open Data agency label 'New York City Housing Authority (NYCHA)' via the Socrata Discovery API and pulled all 24 assets with column schemas.
headline_findings: NYCHA is a split domain: an informational NYC.gov site (Akamai/nginx/Livesite/Dynatrace) plus a resident Self Service Portal that is an Oracle Siebel CRM (selfserve.nycha.info/nycha/app/eservice/enu) with no API.

The reference data is unusually OPEN: 24 NYC Open Data datasets covering developments (Development Data Book, 55 columns), residential addresses, community facilities, six streams of utility consumption-and-cost metering, and aggregate resident demographics.

But the resident SERVICE layer has no machine-readable surface at all — rent, recertification, waitlist applications, and repair work orders live only inside the login-walled, JavaScript-only Siebel portal or a phone call to the Customer Contact Center.
Resident/household data is published only in aggregate (Resident Data Book Summary); NYCHA never exposes an individual HouseholdRecord to Open Data.
Net-new write surface: report a repair (WorkOrder) — the single most common resident transaction, with no API today. See tech-stack.md and apis-observed.md.

apis_observed.note: 24 NYCHA datasets; SODA /resource/<id>.json endpoints. The one real, open NYCHA API — reference/asset data only.
rent, recertification, application/waitlist status, work orders; server-rendered Siebel Open UI (SWECmd), JavaScript-only, no JSON/OpenAPI.
content only; Akamai edge, nginx, Dynatrace RUM. No content API.

fruit.name: Public Housing Developments
opendata_match: NYCHA Public Housing Developments Map npwq-dpkb
fruit.notes: Core physical/administrative unit. Keyed on TDS #, EDP #, HUD AMP #; rich Development Data Book with population, units, buildings, site, and full geography spine.

fruit.name: Residential Addresses
fruit.notes: Street-level buildings under each development; BIN, BBL, census tract, NTA, lat/long, all legislative districts.

fruit.name: Community Facilities & Service Centers
opendata_match: Directory of NYCHA Community Facilities crns-fw6u (16c)
NYCHA Facilities and Service Centers d4iy-9uh7 (15c)
Map of NYCHA Community Facilities pv8j-5ywy
fruit.notes: Senior centers, day care, community centers, service and contact centers; sponsor, program type, status, geography.

fruit.name: Utility Consumption & Cost (PropertyMeter)
fruit.notes: Six parallel consumption-and-cost datasets, per development per revenue month; UMIS Bill ID, meter number, rate class, vendor, charges. NYCHA's most-viewed dataset.

fruit.name: Resident Demographics (aggregate)
fruit.notes: Population, families, income, age bands per development/program — AGGREGATE ONLY. No individual HouseholdRecord is ever published (privacy by design).

fruit.name: Resident Economic Empowerment (REES) / Jobs
opendata_match: Resident Jobs Programs and Training an6v-iuem
fruit.notes: Local Law 163 workforce/economic-empowerment rollups; several related SBS/DYCD/DCAS datasets sit under other agencies' labels.

fruit.name: Pay rent
fruit.notes: Rent payment lives only in the Siebel Self Service Portal; no API. Listed as a locked service-layer transaction.

fruit.name: Public housing / Section 8 waitlist application
fruit.notes: Apply / check waitlist status (WaitlistApplication) — Siebel-only; no API. An alternative net-new write surface.

fruit.name: Report a repair (work order)
fruit.notes: The single most common resident transaction — create and track a maintenance work order. No API and no Open Data twin; lives only in the Siebel portal or a phone call to the Customer Contact Center. The net-new WRITE surface for this domain.

fruit.name: 2026 Physical Needs Assessment (PNA) Development Results
fruit.notes: PNA capital-needs data file, per development (388 KB).

fruit.name: 2025 Physical Needs Assessment (PNA) Development Results
fruit.notes: Prior-year PNA capital-needs data file, per development.
